command: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run)

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists anywhere under app/ (confirmed absent: no .eslintrc*, no eslint.config.*, no eslintConfig key in package.json), unchanged since S1-S4's baseline. package.json's 'lint' script ('next lint') would prompt interactively to scaffold a config on first run — not invoked.

typecheck.detail: No dedicated Makefile/package.json typecheck script exists; ran the project's own installed typescript directly against tsconfig.json (strict: true, noEmit: true, lib: [dom, dom.iterable, esnext] — no 'webworker' lib entry, relevant to this story's new Worker file). Zero errors at baseline.
